name: arkadaz
description: tiger-skills: code-quality (inner loop) and harness-engineering (outer loop) — two skills that work as one system

plugins.name: tiger-skills
plugins.description: Two skills that work as one system. code-quality (inner loop): 13 design principles + 11 tooling rules with comprehension gate, DI enforcement, no Any/object types, no nested functions. harness-engineering (outer loop): self-contained 7-phase conductor with bootstrap gate, business discovery, auto-track 8 harness files, Iron Law verification, subagent-driven development.
